SELECT
ROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,
ROL.SS_CD,
ROL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
ROL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
(ROL.RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT - ROL.RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT) AS ADJUSTMENT_REVENUE, 
ADJUSTMENT_REVENUE * COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) AS ADJUSTMENT_REVENUE_USD_AMT,
ROL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD,
ROL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_ISO_CURR_CD,
EXT_ALL.ORDER_LINE_ID      AS LINE_ID,
ROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY,
ROL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
COALESCE(EXT_ALL.RULE_START_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01')  RULE_START_DATE,
COALESCE(EXT_ALL.TRX_LINE_ID,-9999) AS TRX_LINE_ID ,
NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT CUST_TRX_ID,
ROL.GL_DT,
ROL.GL_POSTED_DT,
(ADJUSTMENT_REVENUE_USD_AMT/CASE WHEN ROL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD  = 'USD' THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END ) AS AMOUNT
,EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT 
,NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT 
,EVNGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
,EVNGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
,CAST(-999 AS VARCHAR(30)) PD_SALES_REP_NUM
,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER) PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER) POS_TRX_ID_INT
,'=' AS DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG
,EXT_ALL.Attribute4 
,EXT_ALL.ORG_ID
,EXT_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  
,'=' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
,CAST(100 AS DECIMAL(18,6))
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI ROL
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_NA EXT_ALL
ON ROL.SK_TRX_ID_INT=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID 
AND ROL.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT = EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_ID
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON ROL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
  ON ROL.BK_COMPANY_CD= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE  
    AND ROL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON NP.ITEM_KEY = ROL.PRODUCT_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT EVNGLA
   ON ( EVNGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY     = ROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY  
   AND  EVNGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME) 
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY=ROL.AR_TRX_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
  ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = ROL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD
  AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = 'USD'
  AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = ROL.GL_DT            
  AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate' 
  WHERE  1=1
AND ROL.GL_POSTED_DT IS NOT NULL 
AND EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4 NOT IN ('POS')
AND ROL.GL_DT  BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
AND ROL.GL_POSTED_DT <> '3500-01-01'
AND ROL.ACCT_CLASS_CD = 'REVENUE'
AND NOT EXISTS 
                ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR 
                   WHERE DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = ROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
                  AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='NA_ADJ'
               )
 UNION
SELECT 
ROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,
ROL.SS_CD,
ROL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
ROL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
(ROL.RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT - ROL.RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT) AS ADJUSTMENT_REVENUE, 
ADJUSTMENT_REVENUE * COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) AS ADJUSTMENT_REVENUE_USD_AMT,
ROL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD,
ROL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_ISO_CURR_CD,
EXT_ALL.ORDER_LINE_ID      AS LINE_ID,
ROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY,
ROL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
COALESCE(EXT_ALL.RULE_START_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01')  RULE_START_DATE,
COALESCE(EXT_ALL.TRX_LINE_ID,-9999) AS TRX_LINE_ID ,
COALESCE(EXT_ALL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,-999),
ROL.GL_DT,
ROL.GL_POSTED_DT,
(ADJUSTMENT_REVENUE_USD_AMT/CASE WHEN ROL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD  = 'USD' THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END ) AS AMOUNT
,EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT 
,NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT 
,EVNGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
,EVNGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
,SCA.PD_SALES_REP_NUM
,SCA.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,ROL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT AS  POS_TRX_ID_INT
,SCA.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG
,EXT_ALL.Attribute4
,EXT_ALL.ORG_ID
,EXT_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  
,SCA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG  
,CAST(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS DECIMAL(18,6))
FROM 
$$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI ROL
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_NA EXT_ALL
ON ROL.SK_TRX_ID_INT=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID 
AND ROL.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT = EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_ID
/*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_POS_SC SCA
    ON EXT_ALL.NUM_ATTRIBUTE53=SCA.PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
/*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/	
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON ROL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT EVNGLA
   ON ( EVNGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY     = ROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY  
   AND  EVNGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME) 
      INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
  ON ROL.BK_COMPANY_CD= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE  
    AND ROL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
	  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON NP.ITEM_KEY = ROL.PRODUCT_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR 
 ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = ROL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD
  AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = 'USD'
 AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = ROL.GL_DT             
 AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate' 
WHERE 1=1
AND EXT_ALL.Attribute4 = 'POS'
AND ROL.ACCT_CLASS_CD = 'REVENUE'
AND ROL.GL_DT  BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
AND ROL.GL_POSTED_DT <> '3500-01-01'
AND NOT EXISTS 
                ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR 
                   WHERE DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = ROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
                  AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='NA_ADJ'
                 )
 UNION

SELECT 
ROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,
ROL.SS_CD,
ROL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
ROL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
(ROL.RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT - ROL.RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT) AS ADJUSTMENT_REVENUE, 
ADJUSTMENT_REVENUE * COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) AS ADJUSTMENT_REVENUE_USD_AMT,
ROL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD,
ROL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_ISO_CURR_CD,
EXT_ALL.ORDER_LINE_ID      AS LINE_ID,
ROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY,
ROL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
COALESCE(EXT_ALL.RULE_START_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01')  RULE_START_DATE,
COALESCE(EXT_ALL.TRX_LINE_ID,-9999) AS TRX_LINE_ID ,
COALESCE(EXT_ALL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,-999),
ROL.GL_DT,
ROL.GL_POSTED_DT,
(ADJUSTMENT_REVENUE_USD_AMT/CASE WHEN ROL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD  = 'USD' THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END ) AS AMOUNT
,EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT 
,NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT 
,EVNGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
,EVNGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
,SCA.PD_SALES_REP_NUM
,SCA.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,ROL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT AS  POS_TRX_ID_INT
,SCA.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG
,EXT_ALL.Attribute4
,EXT_ALL.ORG_ID
,EXT_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME   
,SCA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG 
,CAST(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS DECIMAL(18,6))
FROM 
$$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI ROL
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_NA EXT_ALL
ON ROL.SK_TRX_ID_INT=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID 
AND ROL.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT = EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_ID
/*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_POS_SC SCA
    ON EXT_ALL.NUM_ATTRIBUTE53=SCA.PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
/*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/	
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON ROL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT EVNGLA
   ON ( EVNGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY     = ROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY  
   AND  EVNGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME) 
      INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
  ON ROL.BK_COMPANY_CD= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE  
    AND ROL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
	  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON NP.ITEM_KEY = ROL.PRODUCT_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR 
 ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = ROL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD
  AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = 'USD'
 AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = ROL.GL_DT             
 AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate' 
WHERE 1=1
AND EXT_ALL.Attribute4 = 'POS'
AND ROL.ACCT_CLASS_CD = 'REVENUE'
AND ROL.GL_DT <= EAMPD.END_DATE
AND ROL.GL_POSTED_DT <> '3500-01-01'
AND  SCA.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > (SELECT  LAST_EXTRACT_DATE              
FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES     WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WI_NCR_NET_ACC_TRX_CG' AND TABLE_NAME='N_POS_SCA_ADJ_CNG_DRCT_NRT_TV' )

SELECT
WNCC.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY    
,'C'  SOURCE_TYPE
,WNCC.LINE_ID
,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
,'X' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
, WNCC.TRX_LINE_ID
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_NA_CUR_CG WNCC
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON WNCC.TRX_LINE_ID                    = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
     ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
   WHERE NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE')/*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE BRAZIL*/
AND EXISTS
   ( 
      SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP_XAAS X
   WHERE X.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   AND (X.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT>0 OR X.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT<-1000000000) /*Q3FY18 SC BIG_INT CHANGE */
    )
   /* Q2FY19 Dec Rel : Included below cond. to exclude XAAS Non reference trx */ 
   AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XAAS_TRX_FROM_ERP_SC EL WHERE EL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AND EL.NON_REF_TRX_FLAG = 'Y' ) 
       AND ATTRIBUTE4 NOT IN ('POS')
  UNION ALL
SELECT
WNCC.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY    
 ,'C'  SOURCE_TYPE
 ,WNCC.LINE_ID
,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
,'Y' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
, WNCC.TRX_LINE_ID
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_NA_CUR_CG WNCC
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON WNCC.TRX_LINE_ID                    = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
     ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
WHERE 
NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE')/*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE BRAZIL*/
AND NOT EXISTS
   ( 
      SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP_XAAS X
   WHERE X.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    AND (X.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT>0 OR X.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT<-1000000000) /*Q3FY18 SC BIG_INT CHANGE */
    )
    /* Q2FY19 Dec Rel : Included below cond. to exclude XAAS Non reference trx from default allocation */ 
   AND NOT EXISTS (
                   SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XAAS_TRX_FROM_ERP_SC EL, 
                     ( SELECT RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP WHERE RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY > 0 GROUP BY 1 ) ERP 
       WHERE EL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
       AND EL.NON_REF_TRX_FLAG = 'Y' 
       AND EL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = ERP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY
      ) 
AND ATTRIBUTE4 NOT IN ('POS')
 UNION ALL
SELECT
WNCC.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY    
 ,'C'  SOURCE_TYPE
 ,WNCC.LINE_ID
,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
,'X' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
, WNCC.TRX_LINE_ID
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_NA_CUR_CG WNCC
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON WNCC.TRX_LINE_ID  = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
     ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
WHERE 
NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE')/*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE BRAZIL*/
AND EXISTS 
(
                   SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XAAS_TRX_FROM_ERP_SC EL, 
                     ( SELECT RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP WHERE RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY > 0 GROUP BY 1 ) ERP 
       WHERE EL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
       AND EL.NON_REF_TRX_FLAG = 'Y' 
       AND EL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = ERP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY
      ) 
AND ATTRIBUTE4 NOT IN ('POS')

SELECT 
 'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS      ,
COALESCE(ACC. BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE, -999)  AS ACCOUNT_CODE,
NULL  AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
WNCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
(ROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT-ROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT ) AS ACCTD_AMOUNT       ,
   'I' ACTION_CODE,
NULL  AS ADJUSTMENT_ID                 ,
NULL  AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER             ,
NULL  AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE     ,
( WNCR.ADJUSTMENT_REVENUE_USD_AMT/CASE WHEN WNCR.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD= 'USD' THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END ) AS AMOUNT          ,
    1 AS BATCH_ID,
   NULL  AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID      ,     
 NULL  AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID         ,  
WNCR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID          , 
 NULL  AS COGS_PERCENT                  ,
NULL  AS COMMENTS                      ,
NULL  AS CONTEXT                       ,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
1 AS CREATED_BY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATION_DATE,
NULL  AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID      ,
WNCR. CUSTOMER_TRX_ID AS  CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
WNCR.TRX_LINE_ID AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG  AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG               ,
NULL  AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT               ,
'NA_ADJ' AS EXTRACT_TYPE         ,   
FTH.FISCAL_ID, 
'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG         , 
NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE      ,
current_timestamp(0) AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
WNCR.GL_DT           AS       GL_DATE        ,
WNCR.GL_POSTED_DT      AS       GL_POSTED_DATE,      
NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME AS GLOBAL_NAME,
NULL  AS GROUPING_ID             ,      
WNCR.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             ,
WNCR.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE         ,
NULL  AS INVOICE_PERCENT               ,
NULL  AS INVOICING_RULE_ID             ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
1 AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
'Y' AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG            ,
NULL  AS LINE_PERCENT                  ,
NULL  AS LINE_SEQ_ID                   ,
NULL  AS LINE_TYPE                     ,
NULL  AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID      ,
NSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT           AS ORDER_HEADER_ID,
WNCR.LINE_ID             AS LINE_ID,    
NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS ORDER_NUMBER,
COMP.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT  AS ORG_ID,
NULL  AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID      ,
NULL  AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ,
'Y' AS QUOTA_FLAG                    ,
NULL  AS REASON_CODE                   ,
NULL  AS REBATE_AMOUNT                 ,
NULL  AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID          ,
NULL  AS REQUEST_ID                    ,
WNCR.RULE_START_DATE AS RULE_START_DATE     ,          
COALESCE(CREDITTYPE.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,0) AS  SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID          ,
COALESCE(CREDITTYPE.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,0) AS  SALESREP_ID          ,
NULL  AS  SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID    ,       
NULL  AS  SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID     ,      
NULL  AS  SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID      ,     
'O' SOURCE_TYPE                   ,
CAST (100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS SPLIT_PERCENT              ,  
 COALESCE(EST_INIT_VAR.TERRITORY_ID,0) AS TERRITORY_ID , 
CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= FTH.END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE CAST(FTH.END_DATE  AS TIMESTAMP(0)) END AS TRANSACTION_DATE,
'O' AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE     ,
NULL AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
cast(NULL as timestamp(0)) AS TRX_DATE,
NULL AS TRX_NAME,
0 AS TRX_NUMBER,
NULL AS TRX_TYPE,
NULL AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
NULL AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
'NA_ADJ' AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
WNCR.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
'Direct Sales' AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
  CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
   OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME  LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME  LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')) ))  THEN 'UNKNOWN'
   ELSE CAST(coalesce(NDEF.SALES_REP_NUMBER,DEF_RULE.SALES_REP_NUMBER) AS VARCHAR(30)) END AS SALES_REP_NUM,              
   CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
   OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME  LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME  LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')) ))
   THEN EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
   ELSE COALESCE(NDEF.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,DEF_RULE.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) END AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
cast(-999 as integer) AS  SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
WNCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
WNCR.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
FROM
(SELECT	SALES_REP_NUMBER,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_CNTRY_SLS_CREDIT_DEFAULT_TV 
		WHERE	BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = 'UNK'  AND END_TV_DT='3500-01-01' AND  Upper(BK_TRX_SOURCE_TYPE_CD) = 'REVLINE' )DEF_RULE,
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_NA_CUR_CG WNCR
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON WNCR.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI ROL
ON ROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=WNCR.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_SLS_CR_FLG_NA WSCF
ON WSCF.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY  = WNCR.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
  LEFT JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES CREDITTYPE
ON CREDITTYPE.NAME  = 'Direct Sales'
AND CREDITTYPE.GLOBAL_NAME=WNCR.SS_CD
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP    ESP_INIT_VAR_IF              
  ON ESP_INIT_VAR_IF.SALES_REP_NAME  = 'FSO Metrix Invoice' 
  AND ESP_INIT_VAR_IF.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP    ESP_INIT_VAR_I              
  ON ESP_INIT_VAR_I.SALES_REP_NAME  = 'MISC. U.S.' 
  AND ESP_INIT_VAR_I.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR             
  ON EST_INIT_VAR.TERRITORY_NAME  = 'MISC. U.S.' 
  AND EST_INIT_VAR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
      LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE FTH/* for fiscal year clumns */
ON CAST(WNCR.GL_DT AS DATE) BETWEEN FTH.START_DATE AND FTH.END_DATE
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON WNCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ACC   ON
   ACC. GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    = WNCR.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY   
LEFT OUTER JOIN    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR 
 ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = WNCR.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD
  AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = 'USD'
AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = WNCR.GL_DT             
 AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate'  
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB 
  ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNCR.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY COMP/* for org id */
ON COMP.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=WNCR.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CSTMR_ACCT_LOCATR_ASGN_TV ASGN  
	ON ROL.BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY = ASGN.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY   
	AND ASGN. END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' 
	
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_POSTAL_ADDRESS_LOCATOR_TV LOC  
	ON ASGN.LOCATOR_KEY = LOC.LOCATOR_KEY    AND LOC. 	END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_CNTRY_SLS_CREDIT_DEFAULT_TV NDEF  
	ON NDEF.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = LOC.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE  
	AND NDEF. 	END_TV_DT='3500-01-01'  
	AND Upper(NDEF.BK_TRX_SOURCE_TYPE_CD) = 'REVLINE'  

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON WNCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID  = NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT  
	AND NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT >0

LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
   ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
   
   
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
    ON WNCR.TRX_LINE_ID  = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  
	AND NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  >0
	
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC 
   ON (CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0 THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
               ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END=MSC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC 
   ON (NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=MSC.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD)
   
LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP STMAP  
   ON STMAP.SALES_COUNTRY_NAME=NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME
   
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2               
   ON EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=COALESCE(STMAP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,(SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP  WHERE SALES_COUNTRY_NAME='UNITED STATES'))
   AND EST_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
   
WHERE   1=1 AND  WNCR.Attribute4  NOT IN ('POS')
AND  WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'Y'  



union all 
 SELECT 
 'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS      ,
COALESCE(ACC. BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE, -999)  AS ACCOUNT_CODE,

WNCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,

  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,

CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATION_DATE,

WNCR.TRX_LINE_ID AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG               ,

'NA_ADJ' AS EXTRACT_TYPE         ,   
FTH.FISCAL_ID,

NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE      ,
current_timestamp(0) AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
WNCR.GL_DT           AS       GL_DATE        ,
WNCR.GL_POSTED_DT      AS       GL_POSTED_DATE,      
WNCR.SS_CD AS GLOBAL_NAME,

WNCR.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             ,
WNCR.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE         ,

NULL  AS INVOICING_RULE_ID             ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,

Coalesce(SC_TV.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,SC_TV_C.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT) AS LINE_SEQ_ID  ,  
NULL  AS LINE_TYPE                     ,
NULL  AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID      ,
NSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT           AS ORDER_HEADER_ID,
WNCR.LINE_ID             AS LINE_ID,    
NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS ORDER_NUMBER,
COMP.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT  AS ORG_ID,
NULL  AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID      ,
NULL  AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ,
COALESCE(COALESCE(NSCTT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG,NSCTT_ORIG.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG),'=')  AS QUOTA_FLAG , 
NULL  AS REASON_CODE                   ,
NULL  AS REBATE_AMOUNT                 ,
NULL  AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID          ,

WNCR.RULE_START_DATE AS RULE_START_DATE     ,          
Coalesce(SC_TV.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT,SC_TV_C.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT) AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID ,  
Coalesce(SC_TV.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT,SC_TV_C.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT) AS SALESREP_ID ,   
NULL  AS  SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID    ,       
NULL  AS  SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID     ,      
NULL  AS  SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID      ,     
WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE AS SOURCE_TYPE                   ,
Coalesce(SC_TV.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,SC_TV_C.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT)  AS SPLIT_PERCENT ,               
Coalesce(SC_TV.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT,SC_TV_C.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT) AS TERRITORY_ID , 
CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= FTH.END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE CAST(FTH.END_DATE  AS TIMESTAMP(0)) END AS TRANSACTION_DATE,
'O' AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE     ,
NULL AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
cast(NULL as timestamp(0)) AS TRX_DATE,
NULL AS TRX_NAME,
NULL AS TRX_NUMBER,
NULL AS TRX_TYPE,
NULL AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
NULL AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
'NA_ADJ' AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
WNCR.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
Coalesce(SC_TV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,SC_TV_C.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,SC_TV_ORIG.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE),
Coalesce(SC_TV.SALES_REP_NUMBER,SC_TV_C.SALES_REP_NUMBER,SC_TV_ORIG.SALES_REP_NUMBER),
Coalesce(SC_TV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,SC_TV_C.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,SC_TV_ORIG.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY),
Cast(Coalesce(SC_TV.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,SC_TV_C.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT) AS INTEGER) AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT ,
WNCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
WNCR.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_NA_CUR_CG WNCR
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI ROL
ON ROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=WNCR.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON WNCR.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY COMP
ON COMP.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=WNCR.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_SLS_CR_FLG_NA WSCF
ON WNCR.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY = WSCF.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
  ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = COMP.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
  AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'
   LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  SC_TV 
  ON SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WSCF.LINE_ID 
  AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE 
  AND SC_TV.SS_CD =  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE   

     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT= WNCR.TRX_LINE_ID 
    AND WNCR.SS_CD =  NATL.SS_CODE  		 

 LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  SC_TV_C 
  ON SC_TV_C.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY     =  NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  AND SC_TV_C.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE 
  AND SC_TV_C.SS_CD =  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE   
										 

LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  SC_TV_ORIG 
  ON SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WSCF.LINE_ID 
  AND SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE 
  AND SC_TV_ORIG.SS_CD =  EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCTT
  ON SC_TV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = NSCTT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
  AND NSCTT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCTT_ORIG
  ON SC_TV_ORIG.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = NSCTT_ORIG.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
  AND NSCTT_ORIG.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01' 
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE FTH
ON CAST(WNCR.GL_DT AS DATE) BETWEEN FTH.START_DATE AND FTH.END_DATE  
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ACC   ON
   ACC. GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    = WNCR.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY   
LEFT OUTER JOIN    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR 
 ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = WNCR.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD
  AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = 'USD'
AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = WNCR.GL_DT             
 AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate'   
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB 
  ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNCR.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON WNCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
 WHERE    WNCR.Attribute4 NOT IN ('POS')
AND  WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'N' 
  UNION ALL

 NULL  AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID         ,  
EL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID          , 
 NULL  AS COGS_PERCENT                  ,
NULL  AS COMMENTS                      ,
NULL  AS CONTEXT                       ,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,

CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATION_DATE,
NULL  AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID      ,
CUSTOMER_TRX_ID AS  CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
EL.TRX_LINE_ID AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
'N' AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG               ,
NULL  AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT               ,
'NA_ADJ' AS EXTRACT_TYPE         ,   
(SELECT FISCAL_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE) AS FISCAL_ID, 
'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG         , 
NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE      ,
current_timestamp(0) AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
EL.GL_DT           AS       GL_DATE        ,

EL.SS_CD AS GLOBAL_NAME,
NULL  AS GROUPING_ID             ,      
EL.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             ,

'Y' AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG            ,

-999 AS LINE_SEQ_ID                   ,
NULL  AS LINE_TYPE                     ,
NULL  AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID      ,
-999         AS ORDER_HEADER_ID,
EL.LINE_ID             AS LINE_ID,    
-999 AS ORDER_NUMBER,
COMP.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT  AS ORG_ID,
NULL  AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID      ,
NULL  AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ,
'Y' AS QUOTA_FLAG                    ,
NULL  AS REASON_CODE                   ,
NULL  AS REBATE_AMOUNT                 ,
NULL  AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID          ,

EL.RULE_START_DATE AS RULE_START_DATE     ,          
COALESCE(CREDITTYPE.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,0) AS  SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID          ,
COALESCE(CREDITTYPE.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,0) AS  SALESREP_ID          ,

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ACC

    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB 
  ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
 LEFT OUTER JOIN    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR 
 ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = EL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD
  AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = 'USD'
AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = EL.GL_DT             
 AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate'    
    LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE FTH
ON CAST(EL.GL_DT AS DATE) BETWEEN FTH.START_DATE AND FTH.END_DATE  
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY COMP
 ON COMP.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=EL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
 LEFT JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES CREDITTYPE
ON CREDITTYPE.GLOBAL_NAME=EL.SS_CD 
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY ST 
 ON ST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=EL.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
and ST.GLOBAL_NAME='CG'
WHERE EL.ATTRIBUTE4='POS'

WNCR. CUSTOMER_TRX_ID AS  CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
WNCR.TRX_LINE_ID AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,

NULL  AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT               ,
'NA_ADJ' AS EXTRACT_TYPE         ,   
FTH.FISCAL_ID, 
'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG         , 
NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE      ,

WNCR.GL_DT           AS       GL_DATE        ,

  CASE WHEN SC_TV_ERP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN SC_TV_ERP.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT
           WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
     OR NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE')/*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/)
          THEN SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT 
          ELSE Coalesce(SC_TV.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT) END AS LINE_SEQ_ID  ,

NULL  AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID      ,
CASE  WHEN Coalesce(SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD) ='O' THEN Coalesce(SSO_SC.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,SSO_SC_ORIG.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT)
       ELSE Coalesce(SSO_DFLT_SC.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,SSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT)
     END   AS ORDER_HEADER_ID , 
     CASE WHEN  WNCR.LINE_ID = -9999  THEN 
         CASE WHEN Coalesce(SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD) = 'O' THEN Coalesce(SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT)
           ELSE NULL
         END
       ELSE WNCR.LINE_ID
     END AS ORDER_LINE_ID  ,
NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS ORDER_NUMBER,
COMP.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT  AS ORG_ID,
NULL  AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID      ,
NULL  AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ,
'Y'        AS QUOTA_FLAG ,  
NULL  AS REASON_CODE                   ,
NULL  AS REBATE_AMOUNT                 ,
NULL  AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID          ,
- 999  AS REQUEST_ID,
WNCR.RULE_START_DATE AS RULE_START_DATE     ,          
CASE WHEN SC_TV_ERP.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN Coalesce(ESCT_INIT_VAR2_ERP.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,0)
          WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
     OR NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/)
          THEN Coalesce(ESCT_INIT_VAR2.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,0) 
          ELSE Coalesce(SC_TV.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT) END AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID ,  
CASE  WHEN SC_TV_ERP.SALES_REP_NUMBER IS NOT NULL THEN Coalesce(ESP_ERP.SALES_REP_ID,0)
    WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
     OR NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/)
          THEN Coalesce(ESP_XAAS.SALES_REP_ID,0)
          ELSE Coalesce(SC_TV.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT)  END AS SALESREP_ID ,
NULL  AS  SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID    ,       
NULL  AS  SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID     ,      
NULL  AS  SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID      ,     
WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE AS SOURCE_TYPE                   ,
CASE WHEN SC_TV_ERP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN SC_TV_ERP.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT
          WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
     OR NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/)
          THEN SC_TV_XAAS.SPLIT_PCT
          ELSE  Coalesce(SC_TV.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT)  END     AS SPLIT_PERCENT ,  
CASE WHEN  SC_TV_ERP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN Coalesce(EST_INIT_VAR2_ERP.TERRITORY_ID,  0) 
     WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
     OR NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/)
   THEN Coalesce(EST_INIT_VAR2.TERRITORY_ID,  0)  
     ELSE Coalesce(SC_TV.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT)  END         AS TERRITORY_ID , 
CASE WHEN Current_Date <=  NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE   THEN Current_Timestamp(0) ELSE Cast ( NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
      END AS TRANSACTION_DATE,
'O' AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE     ,
NULL AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
Cast(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS TRX_DATE,
NULL AS TRX_NAME,
NULL AS TRX_NUMBER,
NULL AS TRX_TYPE,
NULL AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
NULL AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
'NA_ADJ' AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
WNCR.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
CASE WHEN SC_TV_ERP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN SC_TV_ERP.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
          WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
     OR NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/) 
          THEN SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
          ELSE  Coalesce(SC_TV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,SC_TV_ORIG.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE) 
       END  BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE  ,
CASE WHEN SC_TV_ERP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN SC_TV_ERP.SALES_REP_NUMBER
          WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
     OR NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/) 
          THEN SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_REP_NUM
          ELSE Coalesce(SC_TV.SALES_REP_NUMBER,SC_TV_ORIG.SALES_REP_NUMBER) END  SALES_REP_NUMBER,
     CASE WHEN SC_TV_ERP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN SC_TV_ERP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
          WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
     OR NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/) 
          THEN SC_TV_XAAS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
          ELSE Coalesce(SC_TV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,SC_TV_ORIG.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY)  END  SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
     CASE WHEN SC_TV_ERP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN SC_TV_ERP.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
          WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
     OR NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/)
          THEN -999
          ELSE Coalesce(SC_TV.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT) END AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
WNCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
WNCR.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_NA_CUR_CG WNCR
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON WNCR.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON WNCR.TRX_LINE_ID = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
--getSOdetails
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI ROL
ON ROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=WNCR.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_SLS_CR_FLG_NA WSCF
ON WNCR.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY = WSCF.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY COMP/* for org id */
ON COMP.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=WNCR.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
  ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = COMP.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
  AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  SC_TV 
      ON SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WSCF.LINE_ID 
      AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE 
      AND SC_TV.SS_CD =  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  SC_TV_ORIG 
      ON SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WSCF.LINE_ID 
      AND SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE 
      AND SC_TV_ORIG.SS_CD =  EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD
AND NOT EXISTS  /* knarlapu: added to pick only CG record in case of same line  exixts in CG and Non-CG */
     (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP X WHERE  SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT 
     AND SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD 
     AND X.SS_CD = 'CG'  )
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP_XAAS  SC_TV_XAAS 
  ON SC_TV_XAAS.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY =  NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  --AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE   
AND (SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT>0 OR SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT<-1000000000) /*Q3FY18 SC BIG_INT CHANGE */
LEFT OUTER JOIN  
     ( SELECT SC_TV.* FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP SC_TV
        INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XAAS_TRX_FROM_ERP_SC EL 
      ON EL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SC_TV.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY
        WHERE SC_TV.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY > 0
         AND EL.NON_REF_TRX_FLAG = 'Y'    
     ) SC_TV_ERP 
     ON SC_TV_ERP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY =  NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_SC
       ON SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = NSOL_SC.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
       AND SC_TV.SS_CD = NSOL_SC.SS_CODE
       AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O'  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_SC_ORIG
       ON SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = NSOL_SC_ORIG.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
       AND SC_TV_ORIG.SS_CD = NSOL_SC_ORIG.SS_CODE
       AND SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O'  
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_SC
      ON NSOL_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_SC_ORIG
      ON NSOL_SC_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_SC_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT
      ON ESCT.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID = SC_TV.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT
      AND ESCT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSO_DFLT_SC
      ON WNCR.LINE_ID = NSO_DFLT_SC.BK_LINE_REF_NUM              
      AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSO_DFLT_SC.SS_CODE   
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_DFLT_SC
      ON NSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_DFLT_SC_CAL
      ON NSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY              
      AND EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = NSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.SS_CODE   
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_DFLT_SC_CAL
      ON NSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
      ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY 
     LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
     ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY    
    /*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
    /* LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC 
     ON (NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=MSC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)*/
     LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC 
     ON (CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
                ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
                END = MSC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)
    /*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
    
     LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC 
     ON (NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=MSC.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD)
     /*LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP STMAP  
     ON STMAP.SALES_COUNTRY_NAME=NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2               
     ON EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=COALESCE(STMAP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,(SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP  WHERE SALES_COUNTRY_NAME='UNITED STATES'))
     AND EST_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME   : COMMENTED AS PART OF Q1FY18 SOT XAAS*/
     /*ARAJANAL : added for SAAS Q1FY15*/
     /*PRMADDAL: ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY18 TO DERIVE SALESREP_ID AND SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID FOR XAAS*/
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ESP_XAAS    
     ON ESP_XAAS.SALES_REP_NUMBER=SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_REP_NUM    
     AND ESP_XAAS.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME    
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2                
     ON EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=SC_TV_XAAS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
     AND EST_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT_INIT_VAR2    
     ON ESCT_INIT_VAR2.NAME  = SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE    
     AND ESCT_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
     
       /* Q2FY19 Dec Rel Non Reference Trx Changes */ 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ESP_ERP    
    ON ESP_ERP.SALES_REP_NUMBER=SC_TV_ERP.SALES_REP_NUMBER    
    AND ESP_ERP.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME    
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2_ERP                
    ON EST_INIT_VAR2_ERP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=SC_TV_ERP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
    AND EST_INIT_VAR2_ERP.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT_INIT_VAR2_ERP    
    ON ESCT_INIT_VAR2_ERP.NAME  = SC_TV_ERP.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE    
    AND ESCT_INIT_VAR2_ERP.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE FTH
ON Cast(WNCR.GL_DT AS DATE) BETWEEN FTH.START_DATE AND FTH.END_DATE  
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM 
      ON  FTH.FISCAL_ID =  NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ACC   ON
   ACC. GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    = WNCR.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY   
LEFT OUTER JOIN    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR 
 ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = WNCR.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD
  AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = 'USD'
AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = WNCR.GL_DT             
 AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate'   
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB 
  ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNCR.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON WNCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
 WHERE    WNCR.Attribute4 NOT IN ('POS')
AND  WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'X'
